2026-04-08.en:
Today is the last day in Guangzhou. I ate ZaoCha with my mom’s friend. ZaoCha is very delicious lunch. I ate the Duck, Beaf and Chicken. we went YueShou Park after lunch.  I looked some birds and cats here. The ducks were very cute, and the black swans were very smart.  Then, we went Shangxialu and he went to the company. I walked a hour with watching many interesting shops. And I went the airport, when I got there, I found that the plane was dilated. So I had to stay there 3 hours.
11:55 PM I arrived Shanghai.
It was very beautiful trip.

2026-04-06.en:
I went Shenzhen. This is my second time to visit Shenzhen. Shenzhen is very beautiful and breakthrough city. I went HuaQiangBei, here is like Akihabara. There sales lot of PC parts. It was very interesting.
I ate McDonald for lunch today. I found that Guangdong has more McDonald and KFC than any other chinese cities. The restaurant is look like chinese old castle. But the taste is almost same with others.
And I went some park on the beach. I lent a bike to cycling more than an hour. It was very nice. But I thought that people were too many. Because today is Chinese holiday.
I ate a traditional meal for dinner. It is look like Korean Bibinba. 
After dinner, I went the most famous park in Shenzhen. I saw one of the most beautiful night views in the world.
I walked 23400 steps today. It’s so tired.

2026-04-11.en:
Today I went to the 成人式. This event was that both Chinese and Japanese celebrities the new 20 years old person. 20歳ではないが, I was invited by Mizuki so I went there. This event was very good and 貴重な experience for me. I can make some new Chinese friends at this time. I could win the Bingo Game and I got a nice cup. It was so funny. After the event, I drunk some alcohol with Mizuki in my room. It was really fun. Today, I couldn’t go to work out, it was not good. But my App will complete soon.

I went to the coming-of-age ceremony. It was a rare opportunity.
2026-04-11.jp: 成人式に行った。貴重な機会だった
2026-04-11.lastTranslatedJP: 成人式に行った。貴重な機会だった

2026-04-09.en:
Today, I took Jingdu and Video class. I forgot taking a breakfast for school. But today’s class started second period. So I could take a lunch after a period. I ate Chinese noodle for lunch with Shota. I changed some beaf and some vegetables.
After school, I needed to wash my clothes. But the laundry in my floor was full, so I used upstairs one.
While the laundry was running , I went to cutting my hair. While the dryer was running, I went to the gym and worked out.
After working out, I took a shower and went to the library to study Chinese. I studied more than three hours. I ate Mala noodle for dinner with Mizuki, she ate Mala XiangGuo. I ate not hot one, but I felt it was a little hot.
Tomorrow, I have a speech about my hobby, snowboarding. I will practice this and go to bed.

2026-04-12.en:
Today, I didn’t do anything.
I got up at eleven with Mizuki. 
I ate Shengjian for lunch, it is one of the best Waimai meal for me.
After 8:00 PM, we started to study. I made this app. I used ChatGPT. And from today, I started using Git for 管理。
But also This app have many problems, so I have to fix them.
This app is my first completed one. I want to make many other one for study front ends.

Spent a lot of time slaving away in my room.
Administering the system.
2026-04-12.jp:
部屋でだらだら過ごしていた。
システムを管理する。
2026-04-12.lastTranslatedJP:
部屋でだらだら過ごしていた。
システムを管理する。

2026-04-10.en:
Today, I lated to my class. But I could do the speech. I didn’t making a ppt but I used some new words and phrases, so I think that is not bad. After school my mom came to my room. This is the second time she came. Last time, I still live in 901. Then we ate hengjiuyiqian. Their restaurant is very good. After lunch, I went to work out. Today is a shoulder day. It was very good.
And I thought going to the library, but I decided to start making a new application. I used ChatGPT and made the prototype. Maybe more than six hours, I did it.
Tomorrow I will go to the 友好会
I want to finish to make the application this weekend.

2026-04-05.en:
I started to make dairy everyday from today.
Yesterday I drank some whiskey with Mizuki. Afternoon, I went to Guangzhou, for trip.
This is my first time to visit Guangzhou. 
When arrived at guangzhou, the weather was terrible bad. like a storm. And I found Guangzhou Taxi is looking like a shark. very cite.
My taxi driver was native guangzhou people. He talked with his friends with Guangdong hua. I can’t understand.
I only went Beijing-lu today. I ate Kao-e for dinner. It was more delicious than Changchun one.

2026-04-13.en:
Today, I had Jingdu and Guoqing class. But today, Jingdu class had many homework.
After school, I went to work out. Today is the arms day. I worked out more than a hour.
After training, I went to the library to make new app and to do the homework.
2026-04-13.jp:
学校については特に面白いことは無かった。
今日の筋トレの調子はとても良かった。

2026-04-07.en:
Today, I backed to Guangzhou. I went the park on the side of the sea. This park is Shamiandao. Here is an island, have a lot of Mangroves and old Europe structures.
I ate a beaf noodle for lunch. But the taste was not very good. After dinner I went an old Jiaotang. It was very beautiful but there was not opened. So I only can see out of the fence. And, I went YongQingFang. Here has old city and river. It is so cool. After this I went to the hotel. Today I stayed with my mom. So I can stay a good hotel. Today I stayed Sheraton. After dinner, I went guangzhou tower, the sights were amazing.
